libraryFilesRead: Baseline data analysis only — source code verification deferred to execution phase

tasks.details: fuzzy-matching.md, type-formatting.md, type-matching.md, type-qualification.md, whizbang-ids.md all have no YAML frontmatter. These cover the type identity system which is critical for AOT compatibility. Need full frontmatter with descriptive tags.

raw-sql.md and vector-search.md have no frontmatter. raw-sql tags should include: raw SQL, Dapper, direct query, performance, bypass EFCore. vector-search tags: pgvector, similarity search, embeddings, cosine distance, nearest neighbor.

implementing-multi-tenancy.md and message-security.md have no frontmatter. Multi-tenancy tags: tenant isolation, row-level security, scope filtering, TenantId. Message security tags: authorization, impersonation, scope context, security propagation.

multi-tenancy.md, scope-propagation.md, scoping.md, security-context-propagation.md, security.md all have frontmatter but missing codeReferences. Should reference IScopeContext, IScopeFilter, ITenantProvider, etc.

tasks.summary: All 4 _folder.md files missing description, tags, codeReferences
tasks.details: identity, persistence, security, lenses folder metadata files all only have title and order. Need version, category, description, tags for search discoverability.

tasks.summary: Security section has potential overlap: scoping.md, scope-propagation.md, security-context-propagation.md
tasks.details: Three pages cover overlapping scope/security propagation topics. scoping.md covers the scoping model. scope-propagation.md covers how scope flows through messages. security-context-propagation.md covers security context specifically. May be intentional (different aspects) but need to verify they're cross-linked and non-redundant.

tasks.summary: Verify lenses API matches current implementation
tasks.details: Lenses are the read-side query interface. Need to verify ILens<TModel>, IScopedLens<TModel>, ILensQueryFactory interfaces match current code. Also verify scoped queries, temporal queries, and multi-model queries reflect current EF Core 10 patterns.

tasks.summary: Assembly registry — verify coverage of type discovery patterns
tasks.details: The identity section covers type matching, formatting, qualification, and assembly registry. These support AOT-compatible type resolution. Need to verify docs match current implementation, especially around IAssemblyRegistry and fuzzy matching algorithms.

tasks.summary: Persistence page — verify covers current UoW and DbContext patterns
tasks.details: Persistence section has only 2 pages. Need to verify persistence.md covers the current unit-of-work patterns, DbContext lifecycle, and how persistence integrates with the dispatcher's SaveChangesAsync flow. observability.md covers message envelope persistence/tracing.

tasks.summary: Code samples across all 28 pages have auto-generated poor metadata
tasks.details: Same pattern. ~50+ code samples need metadata review.

tasks.summary: Tags need synonym expansion across all 4 subsections
tasks.details: Pages that DO have tags need synonym expansion for better search: identity (type resolution, AOT type matching, assembly scanning), persistence (unit of work, DbContext, SaveChanges), security (authorization, RBAC, tenant isolation, row-level security), lenses (read model, query, projection reader, CQRS read side).

sectionSummary: The remaining fundamentals cover 4 subsections with 28 content pages. The biggest issues: (1) 9 pages have NO frontmatter at all (5 in identity, 2 in lenses, 2 in security), (2) 9 more pages missing codeReferences (mostly security), (3) potential redundancy in security section (3 scope/propagation pages), (4) detailed API verification deferred to execution phase for lenses, identity, and persistence. No broken code-docs links — these sections have good link coverage. The identity section's AOT type system and the lenses query model need thorough source comparison during execution.
